g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about EDA for the student performance dataset')
g.text: 1792 rows · 13 columns · 8 batches · 8 semesters · 4 performance types

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What features should I engineer from the student performance dataset?')
g.text: Score trends, attendance bins, Mid1/Mid2 delta, semester-over-semester SGPA change

svg.text: Pick one or more project tracks ↓

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build a student dropout or performance classification model?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a regression model to predict SGPA?')
sendPrompt('How do I cluster students into groups using unsupervised learning?')
sendPrompt('What ML models should I train for student performance prediction?')
g.text: Baseline: Logistic Regression / Linear Regression / K-Means
Advanced: Random Forest · XGBoost · SVM · Neural Net

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I evaluate my ML model on student performance data?')
g.text: Cross-validation · Confusion matrix · RMSE/MAE · Feature importance
Batch-wise hold-out: train on 2018–2022, test on 2023–2025

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What insights and recommendations can I derive from student performance data?')
g.text: Which factors drive SGPA? · Does attendance really matter?
Batch-wise performance trends · Early warning system for at-risk students

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are some extension ideas for the student performance ML project?')
g.text: Streamlit dashboard · Late Bloomer detection · Batch cohort comparison

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the columns in my student dataset')
sendPrompt('How many students are in the dataset?')
sendPrompt('What do the batch years represent?')
sendPrompt('How are the 4 performance types defined?')

svg.text: Labels: Average (54%) · Low Performer (18%) · Consistent Topper (15%) · Late Bloomer (12%)
Features: Mid1, Mid2, Internals, EndTerm, Attendance, Total_Marks, SGPA
No nulls · Clean numeric data · Imbalanced classes (handle with SMOTE or class_weight)
Note: SGPA and Performance_Type are correlated — careful with target leakage
